channel.title: sindresorhus/amas Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Wenjie Fanstars1 - Front-end engineer for Linux Deepin, blogger of anotherhome.net.
  • Robert Haritonovstars1 - Front-end team lead, SourceJS maintainer and Living Style Guide evangelist.
  • Henry Snopekstars1 - Front-end developer, university student.
  • Rishabh Pugaliastars9 - Full stack engineer. Creator of CSSDeck.
  • DeokHong Kimstars2 - Front-end engineer at NAVER, founder of hackrslab.
  • Una Kravetsstars17 - Front-end developer, Sass things, Dev communities & Open Source Design.
  • Chris Missalstars1 - Maker of Internet things in Austin, TX. A goofball, nerd, and OSS lover.
  • Acho Arnold - Full stack web developer with great passion in Social Psychology.
  • Jan Sanchezstars0 - Front-end developer. Creator of css-url-versioner, open source contributor.
  • Mohamad Jahanistars0 - Software developer from Iran, mostly working on web backends, *nix servers, electronic devices and most cool stuff you can imagine! A knowledge addict, who's reading and working 24/7.
  • Deepak Vermastars1 - Full stack developer at Hometrack Australia, AWS Solution Architect, and passionate about photography.
  • Daichi Furiyastars2 - Software developer in Japan. I love Android, JavaScript and iOS.
  • Breno Polanskistars1 - Front-end software engineer at Meteorite BI.
  • Camilo Novastars3 - Full stack software developer in Colombia.
  • William Oliveira - Front-end developer (Brazilian) working with JavaScript, Angular, Stylus, Gulp, Git, etc. Read more about me on my blog.
  • Danilo Vazstars1 - Front-end developer (Brazilian), working at mLabs with JavaScript, EmberJS, APIs and other cool stuffs. I'm also BeerJS/SJCstars19 organizer.
  • Adrian Mejiastars1 - Software engineer at Cisco. Blogger at adrianmejia.com. Author of "E-commerce Application built with the MEAN stack"stars141. JavaScript lover. Boston located.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2015
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Chris Biscardistars0 - UI lead at Docker. JavaScriptstars2. Haskellstars19. Builder of products and tooling.
  • Maxime Thirouinstars3 - Freelance front-end/UI/UX developer. Open Source addict & compulsive coder.
  • Richard Littauerstars1 - Full stack developer, linguist, and sometime digital nomad. Creating with the MIT Media Lab, wrote the Na'vi Dictionary, NodeSchool organizer, The User Is Drunk.
  • Dan Abramovstars222 - JavaScript and React hobbyist, creator of React Hot Loaderstars12k and Reduxstars55.9k.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2015
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Chris Tankersleystars0 - PHP developer, system admin, speaker, teacher, sometimes writer, and I play video games on YouTube.
  • Hamish Friedlanderstars0 - Developer, CTO at SilverStripe, human (presumed).
  • Joe Ferguson - PHP Dev, Sys Admin, Community Builder, Conf Organizer & Speaker, Maker, Hacker, Tinkerer, Space Geek, Husband. Enjoys craft beers and whiskey. Owned by cats.
  • Matthew Turlandstars2 - Full Stack Engineer at When I Work, author, mentor, and conference speaker.
  • Jeff Carouthstars0 - Lead Platform Engineer at Liftopia, Co-host of the Loosely Coupled Podcast, mentor, and conference speaker.
  • Yitzchok Willrothstars0 - Coder & Rabbi (though seldom at the same time!); Engineering Practice Manager, Grovo; Organizer, ShorePHP & NYPHP; Conference Speaker; Mentor.

    • Ask these organizations anything!

  • Code Monkey Healthstars0 - Helping developers and others with tips, tricks, recipes and programs focused on Lifestyle, Exercise, Attitude and Food LEAF.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Matija Marohnić - From modding Warcraft to frontend design/development and nerdiness for Node.js build tools.
  • Lauri Tervonenstars0 - CS & SE university student in Finland.
  • Will Binns-Smithstars0 - JavaScript at Bitbucket. Makes internet things.
  • Hugo Giraudelstars41 - CSS goblin, Sass hacker, margin psycho.
  • Matthew Muellerstars3 - Creator of Cheerio, Duo, and a few other node modules.
  • Sebastian McKenzie - Creator of Babel.
  • Benny Thomasstars0 - Full stack developer caring about children reading.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2015
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Andy Jiangstars0 - Customer Acquisition and Evangelist at Segment, maker of things.
  • Derick Baileystars2 - Developer and entrepreneur, author and screencaster.
  • Lance Hestars0 - Full stack developer and speaker.
  • Nicholas C. Zakasstars15 - Architect at Box, author, creator of ESLint.
  • Patty Delgadostars0 - Engineering lead at Refinery29. Avid mentor and developer evangelist, especially for women and minorities.
  • Ahmad Nassri - Head of Engineering at Mashape. Technology Entrepreneur & Dog Lover. Toronto ✈ San Francisco.
  • Ryan Christianistars0 - Lead Instructor and Developer at HackerYou in Toronto.
  • Heather Paynestars1 - CEO of HackerYou, founder of Ladies Learning Code.
  • Drew Minnsstars0 - Designer/Developer and Educator. Lead Developer and Instructor with HackerYou.
  • Mikola Lysenkostars8 - Geometry vagrant.
  • Nick Desaulniersstars0 - Open Source Zealot at Mozilla.
  • Vishnu Ksstars2 - Student at IIIT Allahabad. Experimentalist.
  • Darcy Clarkestars2 - Developer, Designer, Founder, Mentor & Speaker.
  • Lim Chee Aunstars11 - Product engineer. GitHub stargazer. Anime lover.
  • Maxime Euzièrestars5 - Front-end hacker and JS code-golfer.
  • Blake Winton - UX Engineer for Mozilla Firefox, and the author of Whimsy.
  • Darrin Heneinstars4 - Design Lead for Firefox Mobile at Mozilla, creator of Lastronaut.
  • Cassie McDanielstars3 - Design Director for Mozilla Foundation, cofounder of Women&&Tech, speaker and writer.
  • Lewis Cowperstars5 - Former forklift driver. Now web developer.
  • Blain Smith - Partner/Engineer at MadGlory and Odd Networks. Rebel Geek.
  • Anselm Hannemannstars8 - Freelance front-end developer, author of WDRL, co-organizer of Nightlybuild.io.
  • Wes Bosstars281 - Full stack developer, independent author, speaker, teacher and JavaScripter.
  • Reza Akhavanstars3 - Engineer at Mozilla. Co-organizer at NodeSchoolSF. Creator of Drywall, Frame, Aqua.
  • Simon Boudriasstars2 - Yeoman, Inquirer.js and a bunch of other node modules. Software engineer at Yelp.

item.title: sindresorhus/amas Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2015
item.description:
Ask these people anything!

  • Kent C. Doddsstars646 - JavaScript dev, open source contributor, community builder, and speaker.
  • Mark Ottostars91 - Designer at GitHub. Creator of Bootstrap.
  • Zach Holmanstars714 - Developer and speaker. Previously worked at GitHub.
  • Pascal Hartigstars34 - Polyglot. Engineer at Twitter. Contributor to Yeoman, TodoMVC, WSK.
  • Stephen Sawchuk - Just having fun. Creator of wiredep, youmeyou. Helper of ^.
